description:
**Bug Report**

Auto-mode picked up a `done` feature in the mythxengine project and spawned an agent on it. The feature had already been merged but auto-mode re-executed it.

**Root Cause**

In `apps/server/src/services/auto-mode-service.ts` line ~4739, the eligibility check has a planSpec fallback that ignores feature status:

```typescript
const isEligibleStatus =
  canonicalStatus === 'backlog' ||
  (feature.planSpec?.status === 'approved' &&
    (feature.planSpec.tasksCompleted ?? 0) < (feature.planSpec.tasksTotal ?? 0));
```

When a feature is moved to `done` but its `planSpec.tasksCompleted` hasn't been updated to match `tasksTotal`, the second condition evaluates to `true` — bypassing the `backlog` gate entirely.

**Fix**

Add explicit exclusion of terminal statuses before the planSpec check:

```typescript
const isEligibleStatus =
  canonicalStatus === 'backlog' ||
  (canonicalStatus !== 'done' && canonicalStatus !== 'verified' &&
   canonicalStatus !== 'review' && canonicalStatus !== 'in_progress' &&
   canonicalStatus !== 'blocked' &&
   feature.planSpec?.status === 'approved' &&
   (feature.planSpec.tasksCompleted ?? 0) < (feature.planSpec.tasksTotal ?? 0));
```

**Files to Modify:**
- `apps/server/src/services/auto-mode-service.ts` (~line 4739)

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] Features with status `done`, `verified`, `review`, `in_progress`, or `blocked` are never eligible for auto-mode execution regardless of planSpec state
- [ ] `backlog` features continue to be picked up normally
- [ ] planSpec fallback still works for backlog features with approved plans
- [ ] `npm run build:server` passes
title: Bug: Auto-mode respawns agents on done features via stale planSpec

descriptionHistory.description:
**Bug Report**

Auto-mode picked up a `done` feature in the mythxengine project and spawned an agent on it. The feature had already been merged but auto-mode re-executed it.

**Root Cause**

In `apps/server/src/services/auto-mode-service.ts` line ~4739, the eligibility check has a planSpec fallback that ignores feature status:

```typescript
const isEligibleStatus =
  canonicalStatus === 'backlog' ||
  (feature.planSpec?.status === 'approved' &&
    (feature.planSpec.tasksCompleted ?? 0) < (feature.planSpec.tasksTotal ?? 0));
```

When a feature is moved to `done` but its `planSpec.tasksCompleted` hasn't been updated to match `tasksTotal`, the second condition evaluates to `true` — bypassing the `backlog` gate entirely.

**Fix**

Add explicit exclusion of terminal statuses before the planSpec check:

```typescript
const isEligibleStatus =
  canonicalStatus === 'backlog' ||
  (canonicalStatus !== 'done' && canonicalStatus !== 'verified' &&
   canonicalStatus !== 'review' && canonicalStatus !== 'in_progress' &&
   canonicalStatus !== 'blocked' &&
   feature.planSpec?.status === 'approved' &&
   (feature.planSpec.tasksCompleted ?? 0) < (feature.planSpec.tasksTotal ?? 0));
```

**Files to Modify:**
- `apps/server/src/services/auto-mode-service.ts` (~line 4739)

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] Features with status `done`, `verified`, `review`, `in_progress`, or `blocked` are never eligible for auto-mode execution regardless of planSpec state
- [ ] `backlog` features continue to be picked up normally
- [ ] planSpec fallback still works for backlog features with approved plans
- [ ] `npm run build:server` passes
